name: AKARI Keymaster
description: Legacy-compatible discovery document for clients that still request /.well-known/agent.json. The canonical latest card is /.well-known/agent-card.json.

schemes.description: Bearer token issued for Keymaster access.

skills.name: Get Secret
skills.description: Fetch an approved secret for a given service and key name through the read-only Keymaster boundary.

skills.name: List Services
skills.description: List supported services and key names that can be requested from Keymaster.

skills.name: List Secrets
skills.description: Enumerate retrievable secret paths and show whether each one is API-verifiable.

skills.name: Health Check
skills.description: Validate Keymaster reachability and check supported credentials against their upstream APIs where possible.

skills.name: Rotate Secret Instructions
skills.description: Explain the safe Vault-side rotation path when a secret must be changed.
